description: UNSTRING with OR delimiter + POINTER + COUNT IN + DELIMITER IN + TALLYING + ON OVERFLOW
notes: UNSTRING 'AAA,BBB;CCC,DDD' by ',' OR ';'. Produces 4 fields: AAA, BBB, CCC, DDD. Delimiters: first is ',', second is ';'. Counts are 3 each. Tally=4. No overflow. This is flagged MR per support matrix (UNSTRING with OR/POINTER/TALLYING). Every banking CSV parser uses this pattern.
